response.overview: Following a conflict with her mother, Gabriela runs away to Bucharest, carrying with her a profound sense of loneliness and disconnection. As she wanders through unfamiliar spaces and fleeting encounters, she is pursued by Noro, an enigmatic presence that embodies her unresolved fears and emotional void. Moving between moments of intimacy, alienation, and self-reflection, Gabriela navigates a fragile coming-of-age journey, questioning identity, purpose, and the possibility of finding a place where she feels whole.
response.title: Through Parallel Mirrors
